nodes.context: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1999 in Pattaya, Thailand; support club for the Bandidos.
Outlaw motorcycle club; Diablos is a support club for Bandidos.
Outlaw motorcycle club; raided Diablos clubhouse in 2013 and clashed with Bandidos.
Criminal group; members involved with Bandidos in extortion case in Finland.

edges.evidence_quote: The Diablos are a support club (called puppet clubs by law enforcement) for the Bandidos.
edges.context: Diablos is a support club for Bandidos, indicating a structural tie.

edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Hells Angels and associated clubs raided the Diablos' clubhouse in Melton, Melbourne, on 1 March 2013, according to the Sydney Morning Herald 'bashing' a Diablos member and taking identification details of the Diablos' girlfriends at gunpoint as a threat to stop them reporting the attack to police.
edges.context: Hells Angels raided Diablos clubhouse, attacking members.

edges.evidence_quote: Approximately thirty minutes after the assault began, Bandidos members arrived in four cars in response to the raid. The Hells Angels group set up their own ambush, ramming a car driven by Bandidos national sergeant-at-arms Toby Mitchell and firing around thirty shots.
edges.context: Hells Angels ambushed Bandidos members who arrived to support Diablos, resulting in a shootout.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the district court, the events originated when the Diablos chapter in Varkaus asked Bandidos' Oulu branch to collect the debt.
edges.context: Diablos asked Bandidos to collect a debt, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: In January 2015, a total of eight people, some of whom were members of the Bandidos and X-Team, were given prison sentences of various lengths for the violent extortion of a man in Oulu that took place in July 2014.
edges.context: Bandidos and X-Team members jointly committed extortion.
